calendar.matters:
PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee, via Zoom, for Oliver Sun, Personal Representative.

The court and counsel discuss the statement in the amended petition regarding payment for her services being made from finds withheld from the proceed of the real property sale and the improper distributions made without court approval. Counsel offers testimony regarding the court's concerns and advises that she misstated the funds as being withheld as they are in an attorney trust account. The court queries counsel as to why the funds are not in an Estate account. Counsel advises that she just recently realized that the funds are not in an estate account and since her client is the lone beneficiary and that it would be more prudent to make distributions from the trust account in-lieu-of opening an Estate account to make the same distributions. The court reiterates to counsel concerning the issue of making distributions without court approval, moving forward.

After additional discussion, the Status is taken off calendar. The Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.
